title: Objectives of Time Series Identification
description: A flowchart illustrating the sequential objectives and key considerations in the identification phase of time series analysis.
relationships: Plotting reveals initial patterns and outliers
Stationarity must be confirmed or achieved (e.g., via differencing) for modeling
Seasonality is identified and measured for potential decomposition
ACF plot helps identify the order (q) of MA models
PACF plot helps identify the order (p) of AR models
